name: Modern Traveler
overview: Alyssa Caverley knows how to make the most out of a trip. From London, England, to Zurich, Switzerland and to New Brunswick, Canada, she takes us with her as she explores new sites and local gems. There's something for every sort of traveler: canyoning and zip lining, European farmer's markets, Canadian gastropubs, and even Swiss train rides to the top of the Alps.
